title: Managing Exam Stress: A Student's Guide
description: Learn practical techniques to manage exam anxiety, including breathing exercises, study planning, and healthy coping mechanisms that actually work.

title: 5-Minute Mindfulness Meditation
description: A quick guided meditation perfect for busy students. Practice between classes or before bed to reduce stress and improve focus.

title: Building Healthy Sleep Habits
description: Sleep is crucial for mental health and academic performance. This guide covers sleep hygiene tips specifically designed for the college lifestyle.

title: Dealing with Peer Pressure
description: Understanding and navigating peer pressure in college. Learn to set boundaries while maintaining friendships and social connections.

title: Self-Care Toolkit for Students
description: A comprehensive toolkit with daily self-care activities, journaling prompts, and wellness trackers to help you prioritize your mental health.

title: When to Seek Professional Help
description: Knowing when it's time to reach out for professional support. This guide helps you recognize the signs and take the first step towards getting help.
